response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his seniority (Staff/Senior roles) exceeds the entry-level scope, and his German language barrier and lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience raise concerns about team integration and role fit.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from frontend to infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of mismatched expectations
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, key required technologies
Basic German proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
